messages.speaker: S
messages.text: Hello, I came across your profile and felt compelled to write. I am a recently widowed engineer working on contract in West Africa.

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: Thank you for your kindness, it means more than you know. Life has been difficult since my wife passed but conversations like this give me hope. May I ask about you?

messages.speaker: V
messages.text: im a nurse, divorced, two kids

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: A nurse and a mother, the most noble combination. Your children are blessed to have you. I have one daughter who lives with her aunt while I am working overseas.

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: She just turned twelve. She is the light of my life along with our growing connection. I find myself smiling at my phone whenever I see your name.

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: My darling, I have terrible news. My daughter has been hospitalized with a sudden illness and the local doctors say she needs urgent surgery. The hospital requires 3500 dollars upfront before they will operate.

messages.speaker: V
messages.text: oh no I'm so sorry, what about your wife's family?

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: They have already contributed everything they have. My funds are tied up in my contract escrow until next month. You are the only person I can turn to in this hour of need my love.

messages.speaker: V
messages.text: i dont have that kind of money on hand

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: Even a partial amount would help. The surgery is scheduled for tomorrow morning at 8 AM their time. Please please my dear, if you can send anything via MoneyGram to the hospital administrator I will repay you tenfold when my escrow releases.

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: There is no time to think my love. My daughter's life hangs in the balance. The hospital will not begin without the deposit. I am begging you, please act now. The MoneyGram details are ready to send to you immediately.

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: Please respond. Every hour matters. Please.
